data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. HOUDINI cannot be faulted this prep, and he was too strong 3 runs ago when well-supported, and he has just bumped into one better at his last couple of starts, going down narrowly at Geelong last time out 2 weeks ago. He drops 2kg here, and with an extra 400m being ideal, he is going to be very hard to hold out late. 15. BON FETE is an honest mare who is racing in great heart, charging home with sharp late sectionals here last time. If she gets the right cart into it, she can have the last say. 13. SO SUAVE finally put it all together at Cranbourne nearly 3 weeks ago, letting down strongly to score with a bit in hand. He draws to get a soft run and can repeat the dose, especially with 2kg less to carry. 3. ALL SO CLEAR is proving costly, but he is a genuine gelding who will have the visors on for the first time, which could make all the difference where it matters most.","runners":[7,15,13,3],"exclusive":true}
